seoTitle: Mount Crawford vs Mount Damper — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Crawford and Mount Damper. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Crawford vs Mount Damper: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Crawford and Mount Damper.
heading: Mount Crawford vs Mount Damper — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Crawford, South Australia and Mount Damper, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Damper has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Mount Crawford (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Crawford or Mount Damper safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Crawford has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Mount Damper scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Crawford scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Damper scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Crawford or Mount Damper?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Damper has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
